title: Add FLTRCK: Flight Log & Records to business
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [FLTRCK: Flight Log & Records](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.fltrckr.app) to business
- Your personal flight log and travel tracker — built for aviation enthusiasts and frequent flyers. Keep a complete flight logbook: log your longest flights, most-visited airports, favourite routes, and

Fixes #10570

gist.headline: Cleared for Takeoff
gist.blurb: FLTRCK just landed in the ecosystem! It's a personal flight log and travel tracker built for aviation enthusiasts to keep track of their favorite routes and longest flights.
gist.summary: Added FLTRCK, a personal flight log and travel tracker app for aviation enthusiasts, to the community showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover FLTRCK in the apps directory to track their flights, most-visited airports, and favorite routes.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee dressed as a retro aviator (goggles and scarf) flying alongside a tiny pixel-art commercial airplane over a cozy landscape, representing the flight tracking app.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny aviator goggles and a red scarf, flying alongside a small chunky pixel airplane over a soft pastel landscape. Lime green (#ecf874) and sky blue gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like A Short Hike. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
